infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StyleMirror uses the camera to scan your face structure and recommend hairstyles. No images are uploaded.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: StyleMirror saves your hairstyle previews to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: StyleMirror uses the camera to scan your face shape and recommend hairstyles.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow StyleMirror to save your hairstyle previews.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow StyleMirror to save your hairstyle previews.
